chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1702 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.6706/25 (U/A). 2. For orders on CMA No.6707/25 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of main case. 09.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the petitioners..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
